targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT("id") FILTER (WHERE status = 'ALIVE') as "Alive",
  COUNT("id") FILTER (WHERE NOT (status IN ('LOST', 'TERMINATED') AND lost_at < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')) as "Total"
FROM agents
;

SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('RUNNING', 'PENDING', 'SCHEDULED', 'PREPARING', 'PULLING', 'TERMINATING')) as "Active",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('TERMINATED', 'CANCELLED', 'ERROR')) as "Terminated"
FROM sessions;

panels.description: This panel tracks maximum and average GPU utilization, providing insights into GPU usage patterns. The maximum utilization values indicate periods of high GPU demand, while the average utilization reflects overall usage trends.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  MAX((accel_util->>'current')::float) AS "Maximum GPU Utilization (%)",
  AVG((accel_util->>'current')::float) AS "Average GPU Utilization (%)"
FROM agent_agentmetric
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC
;

panels.title: Total GPU Utilization

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  MAX((accel_mem->>'current')::float) AS "Maximum GPU Memory",
  AVG((accel_mem->>'current')::float) AS "Average GPU Memory"
FROM agent_agentmetric
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC
;

panels.description: Utilization is 100% if a single device is fully utilized.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  host,
  AVG((accel_util->>'current')::float)
FROM agent_agentmetric
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1, host
ORDER BY 1, host
;

panels.title: GPU core utilization per node

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  host,
  AVG((accel_mem->>'current')::float)
FROM agent_agentmetric
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
GROUP BY 1, host
ORDER BY 1, host
;

panels.description: It represents the total number of GPUs allocated during aggregate interval. Even for compute sessions that are created and terminated within the same aggregate interval, the resource allocation will be counted. Therefore, a single resource can be allocated to two different compute sessions in the same interval, and the number of resource allocations can be greater than the total amount of resources available on the server.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  SUM(CASE
        WHEN session_info.preparing <= date_series.date AND
             session_info.terminated >= date_series.date
        THEN (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float
        ELSE 0
      END) AS "Total Allocation"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date,
     CASE
       WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'hour' THEN interval '1 hour'
       WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'day' THEN interval '1 day'
       WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'week' THEN interval '1 week'
       WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'month' THEN interval '1 month'
     END) as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL AND
     COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date
ORDER BY date_series.date
;

panels.title: Total GPU Allocation Count

panels.description: It represents the total number of active compute sessions in a day. The compute sessions that are created and terminated within the same day will also be counted.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  COUNT(session_times.session_id) AS "Number of Active Sessions"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date,
    CASE
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'hour' THEN interval '1 hour'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'day' THEN interval '1 day'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'week' THEN interval '1 week'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'month' THEN interval '1 month'
    END) as date) as date_series
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     sessions.id as session_id,
     DATE((status_history->>'RUNNING')::timestamp) as running_start,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE
     ) as running_end
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL) AS session_times
   ON session_times.running_start <= date_series.date
   AND session_times.running_end >= date_series.date
GROUP BY
  date_series.date
ORDER BY
  date_series.date
;

panels.title: Total Active Session Counts

panels.description: It represents the total number of GPUs allocated daily per project. Even for compute sessions that are created and terminated within the same day, the resource allocation will be counted. Therefore, a single resource can be allocated to two different compute sessions in a day, and the number of resource allocations can be greater than the total amount of resources available on the project.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  groups.name AS project_name,
  SUM(CASE
        WHEN session_info.preparing <= date_series.date AND
             session_info.terminated >= date_series.date
        THEN (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float
        ELSE 0
      END) AS "PRJ"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date,
    CASE
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'hour' THEN interval '1 hour'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'day' THEN interval '1 day'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'week' THEN interval '1 week'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'month' THEN interval '1 month'
    END) as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots,
     group_id
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL AND
     COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
  JOIN groups ON groups.id = session_info.group_id  -- Join with groups table
GROUP BY date_series.date, groups.name
ORDER BY date_series.date, groups.name;

panels.title: Total Allocated GPUs per Project

panels.description: It represents the total number of GPUs allocated daily per resource group. Even for compute sessions that are created and terminated within the same day, the resource allocation will be counted. Therefore, a single resource can be allocated to two different compute sessions in a day, and the number of resource allocations can be greater than the total amount of resources available on the resource group.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  session_info.scaling_group_name,
  SUM(CASE
        WHEN session_info.preparing <= date_series.date AND
             session_info.terminated >= date_series.date
        THEN (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float
        ELSE 0
      END) AS "RG"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date,
    CASE
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'hour' THEN interval '1 hour'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'day' THEN interval '1 day'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'week' THEN interval '1 week'
      WHEN '$timeAggregation' = 'month' THEN interval '1 month'
    END) as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots,
     scaling_group_name
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL AND
     COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date, session_info.scaling_group_name
ORDER BY date_series.date, session_info.scaling_group_name
;

panels.title: Total Allocated GPUs per Resource Group

panels.description:
This metric shows the degree to which a GPU is occupied during the aggregate interval. If a single GPU is continuously allocated during the aggregate interval, the GPU allocation value will be 1.

For example, if the aggregate interval is set to "day" and a single GPU is allocated for 1 hour, the GPU allocation value will be 0.04 (= 1/24 hours). If a single GPU is allocated for 1 hour each in two different compute sessions at different times during the day, the GPU allocation value will be 0.08.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
        LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
        GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
      )) > 0
      THEN
        (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float *
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
          LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
          GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
        ))
        /
        GREATEST(
          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
            interval '1 $timeAggregation'
          )),
          1 -- Prevent division by zero
        )
        * CASE '$timeAggregation' WHEN 'hour' THEN 1.0 / 24 WHEN 'day' THEN 1 WHEN 'week' THEN 7 WHEN 'month' THEN 30 ELSE 1 END
      ELSE 0 -- If the condition is not met (i.e., duration is zero), contribute 0 to the sum.
    END
  ) AS "Total GPU Allocation"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date, interval '1 $timeAggregation') as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 $timeAggregation' - interval '1 second' -- just before the next period starts
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL AND
     COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date
ORDER BY date_series.date
;

panels.title: Total GPU Allocation

panels.description:
This metric shows the degree to which a GPU is occupied during the aggregate interval PER PROJECT. If a single GPU is continuously allocated during the aggregate interval, the GPU allocation value will be 1.

For example, if the aggregate interval is set to "day" and a single GPU is allocated for 1 hour, the GPU allocation value will be 0.04 (= 1/24 hours). If a single GPU is allocated for 1 hour each in two different compute sessions at different times during the day, the GPU allocation value will be 0.08.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
        LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
        GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
      )) > 0
      THEN
        (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float *
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
          LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
          GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
        ))
        /
        GREATEST(
          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
            interval '1 $timeAggregation'
          )),
          1 -- Prevent division by zero
        )
      * CASE '$timeAggregation' WHEN 'hour' THEN 1.0 / 24 WHEN 'day' THEN 1 WHEN 'week' THEN 7 WHEN 'month' THEN 30 ELSE 1 END
      ELSE 0 -- If the condition is not met (i.e., duration is zero), contribute 0 to the sum.
    END
  ) AS "Total GPU Allocation per Project"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date, interval '1 $timeAggregation') as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 $timeAggregation' - interval '1 second' -- just before the next period starts
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots
   FROM
     sessions
   JOIN groups ON sessions.group_id = groups.id
   WHERE
     groups.name = '$bai_project'
     AND status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL
     AND COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date
ORDER BY date_series.date
;

panels.title: Total GPU Allocation per Project ($bai_project)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_series.date,
  SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
        LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
        GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
      )) > 0
      THEN
        (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float *
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
          LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
          GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
        ))
        /
        GREATEST(
          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
            interval '1 $timeAggregation'
          )),
          1 -- Prevent division by zero
        )
      ELSE 0 -- If the condition is not met (i.e., duration is zero), contribute 0 to the sum.
    END
  ) / $TOTAL_GPU_COUNT * 100 AS "Total GPU Allocation (%)"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date, interval '1 $timeAggregation') as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 $timeAggregation' - interval '1 second' -- just before the next period starts
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots
   FROM
     sessions
   WHERE
     status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL AND
     COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date
ORDER BY date_series.date
;

SELECT
  date_series.date,
  SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
        LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
        GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
      )) > 0
      THEN
        (requested_slots->>'cuda.shares')::float *
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
          LEAST(session_info.terminated, date_series.date + interval '1 $timeAggregation') -
          GREATEST(session_info.preparing, date_series.date)
        ))
        /
        GREATEST(
          EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
            interval '1 $timeAggregation'
          )),
          1 -- Prevent division by zero
        )
      -- * CASE '$timeAggregation' WHEN 'hour' THEN 1.0 / 24 WHEN 'day' THEN 1 WHEN 'week' THEN 7 WHEN 'month' THEN 30 ELSE 1 END
      ELSE 0 -- If the condition is not met (i.e., duration is zero), contribute 0 to the sum.
    END
  ) / $TOTAL_GPU_COUNT * 100 AS "Total GPU Allocation % per Project"
FROM
  (SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::date, $__timeTo()::date, interval '1 $timeAggregation') as date) as date_series
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL
  (SELECT
     DATE((status_history->>'PREPARING')::timestamp) as preparing,
     COALESCE(
       DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp),
       DATE(terminated_at),
       DATE((status_history->>'CANCELLED')::timestamp),
       CURRENT_DATE + interval '1 $timeAggregation' - interval '1 second' -- just before the next period starts
     ) as terminated,
     requested_slots
   FROM
     sessions
   JOIN groups ON sessions.group_id = groups.id
   WHERE
     groups.name = '$bai_project'
     AND status_history->>'RUNNING' IS NOT NULL
     AND COALESCE(DATE((status_history->>'TERMINATING')::timestamp), CURRENT_DATE) >= $__timeFrom()::date) AS session_info
GROUP BY date_series.date
ORDER BY date_series.date
;

panels.description: This panel tracks average GPU utilization, only for the allocated GPUs. The maximum utilization values indicate periods of high GPU demand, while the average utilization reflects overall usage trends.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('$timeAggregation', time) AS time_aggregation,
  AVG((accel_util->>'current')::float / (accel_util->>'capacity')::float * 100) AS "Average GPU Utilization (%)"
FROM session_computesessionmetric
WHERE time >= to_timestamp($__timeFrom(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H')
  AND time < to_timestamp($__timeTo(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H')
  AND accel_util->>'capacity' IS NOT NULL
  AND (accel_util->>'capacity')::float > 0
GROUP BY time_aggregation
ORDER BY time_aggregation DESC
;

panels.title: Total Allocated GPU Utilization

panels.description: This panel tracks average GPU utilization, only for GPUs allocated to the project. The maximum utilization values indicate periods of high GPU demand, while the average utilization reflects overall usage trends.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('$timeAggregation', time) AS time_aggregation,
  AVG((accel_util->>'current')::float / (accel_util->>'capacity')::float * 100) AS "Average GPU Utilization (%)",
  session_id
FROM session_computesessionmetric
WHERE time >= to_timestamp($__timeFrom(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H')
  AND time < to_timestamp($__timeTo(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H')
  AND accel_util->>'capacity' IS NOT NULL
  AND (accel_util->>'capacity')::float > 0
GROUP BY time_aggregation, session_id
ORDER BY time_aggregation DESC, session_id
;

SELECT
  s.id AS session_id, g.name as project_name
FROM sessions AS s
JOIN groups g ON s.group_id = g.id
WHERE s.created_at <= to_timestamp($__timeTo(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H')
  AND (s.terminated_at IS NULL OR s.terminated_at >= to_timestamp($__timeFrom(), 'YYYY-MM-DD H'))
  AND g.name = '$bai_project'
ORDER BY session_id
;

panels.title: Allocated GPU Utilization Per Project ($bai_project)
